rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.0452 governs consumer information about educator preparation programs. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 21.0452. CONSUMER INFORMATION REGARDING EDUCATOR PREPARATION PROGRAMS.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption change and this educator preparation program information statute.
